div.h2: Concurrent Readers & Writer — Snapshot Isolation in WAL Mode

g.text: Phase 3 — R2 Captures Snapshot (sees W1's commit)
Phase 4 — R1 Reads Page 3 (snapshot bounded at frame 5)
Phase 5 — R2 Reads Page 3 (snapshot bounded at frame 8)
Phase 6 — Checkpoint Must Respect Active Snapshots
Phase 7 — R1 Releases Snapshot → Full Checkpoint Possible

text.tspan: to database file at correct offsets
All future reads bounded by max_frame=5
Sees all of W1's committed writes
R1 sees page 3 as of frame 2 ✓
R2 sees page 3 as written by W1 ✓

g.text: R1 released — no longer pinning frame 5

text.tspan: Database file fully up to date
